title: Cosmic Doorway
definition: A passage to other realms or dimensions, found at the center of a nebula.

difficulty_levels.beginner: A magical portal in space that takes you to places older than our own universe.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A stable wormhole or a gateway to another dimension, discovered within a nebula, believed to have existed since the dawn of consciousness in the universe.
difficulty_levels.expert: An extraordinary discovery that reveals the existence of multiple dimensions and civilizations older than humanity, acting as a cosmic network connecting various galaxies, with our species serving as explorers or 'Wayfinders'.

extra_fields.insight: The cosmos is filled with ancient civilizations and hidden doorways to other realms.
